scientific_question: The single OOS-stable observable-headroom region in the whole program (Program I GP-located region) buys its win by starving one CSSU (worst_cssu_fill_delta ~ -0.13 vs the -0.02 guardrail). Does giving the controller an explicitly fairness-aware allocation rule -- the reduced-model analogue of decision right op11_allocation_rule / max_min_fill -- convert any of that headroom into FAIR observable value, under a hard fairness non-inferiority guardrail?

relationship_to_prior_work.decision_right_catalog: contracts/decision_right_catalog_v1.json -- op11_allocation_rule, levels [fifo, mission_priority, max_min_fill], status requires_adapter; catalog invariant: requires_adapter factors cannot enter a scientific screen until liveness and ledger tests pass
relationship_to_prior_work.not_a_rescue: No closed lane is reopened. The Program I region was refused as a lane BECAUSE of the fairness guardrail; this probe tests a NEW decision right aimed at exactly that failure, on the same custodied region.
relationship_to_prior_work.war_stress_atlas: fully independent; seed series 747 is never touched by this probe

model_scope.environment: supply_chain/headroom_sensitivity.py -- reduced two-CSSU shared-convoy model (exact Program G physics via program_g.materialize_tape + frozen commonality coupling). The environment code is NOT modified by this probe; only new policy functions are added.
model_scope.metric: ret_order and guardrail fields as computed by supply_chain/program_g.py metrics (worst_cssu_fill at program_g.py:420 vintage of the freeze commit). This is the reduced-model metric, NOT the canonical DES endpoint.
model_scope.claim_boundary: DEVELOPMENT ONLY. No Paper 2 claim, no managerial claim, no learner, no canonical-metric claim. A PASS authorizes exactly one action: preregistering a full-DES op11 adapter contract (liveness + ledger tests per the catalog invariant, canonical ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2 endpoint). A FAIL closes the fair-conversion door and is recorded in the boundary certificate as a disclosed negative.

policy_families.anchor_ratio_belief: the EXACT Program I belief policy (headroom_sensitivity._belief_policy) -- the known fairness-violating anchor; reproduction control only, never a candidate

fair_candidates_frozen.rule: each week serve the CSSU with the LOWER realized cumulative fill rate to date; tie -> lower belief expected cover; HOLD is never selected
ratio belief rule, overridden to serve the other CSSU whenever its realized cumulative fill trails the served CSSU's by more than delta
ratio belief rule constrained so no CSSU goes unserved for 2 consecutive weeks

policy_families.information_set: identical to the Program I belief policy: CSSUFilter posteriors updated with realized demand + advance signal, plus realized own-trajectory fill history. Non-anticipative; no tape-future access.
policy_families.resources: identical action set program_g.ACTIONS = (A, B, HOLD), identical single convoy, identical inventories. Allocation redistributes; it creates nothing.
policy_families.no_posthoc_extension: no candidate, parameter value, or theta may be added after this freeze

comparator: strongest full-contract periodic calendar selected in-sample on the eval tapes -- byte-identical to headroom_at's static baseline. The comparator is never weakened.

estimand.H_obs_fair: mean ret_order of the selected fair-family policy minus the best static comparator, per block
estimand.guardrail_eligibility: a candidate is eligible on a block iff, vs the SAME comparator on the SAME tapes: worst_cssu_fill_delta >= -0.02 AND attended_delta >= -0.02 AND ret_quantity_delta >= -0.02
estimand.selection_rule: argmax mean H_obs_fair among ELIGIBLE candidates on DEVELOPMENT blocks only; frozen in an execution-freeze artifact (candidate id + parameters + sha256) before confirmation
estimand.eta_fair_report_only: H_obs_fair / H_PI at theta_star, diagnostic never a gate

gates_in_order.spec: burned block 3000001-3000200 at theta_star: anchor_ratio_belief must reproduce H_obs > 0 with CI95 > 0 AND worst_cssu_fill_delta <= -0.10 (the known violation). FAIL -> STOP_ENV_MISMATCH; nothing further runs.
commonality=0: reproduce the Program G anchor (H_PI ~ +0.015, H_obs ~ -0.02) within +/-0.01.

signal_q=0.5 (uninformative): the selected fair candidate's H_obs_fair CI95 must NOT be entirely above 0. This placebo MUST execute and populate a field; a defaulted or missing field voids every downstream verdict (A11 / commit 022abd0 lesson).
selected candidate re-evaluated with advance signals permuted across tapes (mismatched-tape placebo): H_obs_fair CI95 must NOT be entirely above 0.
burned blocks 3000001-3000200, 4200001-4200200, 4500001-4500200 at theta_star: run all frozen candidates, apply guardrail eligibility, select argmax, commit execution-freeze artifact.

VIRGIN block 4800001-4800200 (200 tapes), opened ONCE, only after G0-G4 committed and independently verified: PASS iff one-sided LCB95(H_obs_fair) > 0 AND point estimate >= 0.01 AND all three guardrail deltas >= -0.02 AND >= 120/200 tapes favorable (robust-count guard against bimodality, the Program O OOS lesson). No rescues, no re-selection, no second opening.

if_pass: authorizes ONLY the preregistration of an op11 full-DES adapter contract (liveness + ledger + anti-shed fixtures, canonical metric endpoint). Learner and Paper 2/3 remain blocked behind that separate contract's own gates.
if_fail: the fair-conversion door CLOSES: recorded in the boundary certificate as FAIR_CONVERSION_REFUTED_IN_REDUCED_MODEL (with the numbers), and the full-DES op11 adapter is NOT built.

seeds.virginity_evidence: at the freeze commit, a repository grep for '4800001' returns no seed usage in any code, contract, or result artifact

anti_p_hacking: all candidates, the delta grid, theta_star, thresholds and the favorable-count rule are frozen in this contract before any execution
the confirmation block opens once; every result (pass or fail, all gates, all robustness thetas) is reported
every verdict field must be populated by an executed computation; no field may be read from a default
the comparator family is never reduced or weakened

implementation_split.implementer: PI agent (policy functions + runner + fixture tests; environment untouched)
implementation_split.verifier_gate: the auditor verifies G0-G4 outputs, the execution-freeze artifact, and this contract's sha BEFORE the virgin block is opened

compute_envelope: WEEKS=4, |ACTIONS|=3 (81 oracle sequences/tape); full probe well under 1e5 policy-tape evaluations, minutes on one local core. No cluster, no authorization-cap interaction.
